description: Move workplan execution coordination to SpacetimeDB for distributed multi-host execution, preemption, and real-time observability

tasks.name: Add workplan_phase table to hexflo-coordination
tasks.description: Add SpacetimeDB table for tracking phase state (execution_id, phase_name, status, gate_result, timestamps)

tasks.name: Add workplan_task table to hexflo-coordination
tasks.description: Add SpacetimeDB table for tracking task state (execution_id, task_id, phase_name, status, agent_id, result, timestamps)

tasks.name: Add phase_start reducer
tasks.description: Add reducer to transition phase to running, log heartbeat to hexflo_memory

tasks.name: Add task_spawn reducer
tasks.description: Add reducer to create task in DB, assign agent, log Task START heartbeat

tasks.name: Add task_complete reducer
tasks.description: Add reducer to mark task done, record result, log Task COMPLETE heartbeat

tasks.name: Add task_fail reducer for preemption
tasks.description: Add reducer to mark task failed, enable task reassignment on agent death

phases.name: Update HexFlo to Use DB Coordination

tasks.name: Update workplan_executor to use DB reducers
tasks.description: Modify execute_phase to call phase_start reducer instead of in-memory state
tasks.done_command: cargo check --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Update task spawn to use task_spawn reducer
tasks.description: Modify task spawning to call task_spawn reducer for distributed tracking
tasks.done_command: cargo check --package hex-nexus 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Add agent death detection and task recovery
tasks.description: Add heartbeat timeout logic to detect dead agents and call task_fail for preemption
tasks.done_command: cargo test --package hex-nexus -- workplan 2>/dev/null && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Add real-time progress subscription for dashboard

tasks.name: Add phase/task heartbeat logs to hexflo_memory
